name: Blog Post Creator
description: Research a topic, create an outline, write content, and generate a cover image

inputs.name: Blog Topic
inputs.description: The topic you want to write about

data.prompt: Research the topic '{{topic}}' and provide 5 key points that should be covered in a blog post. Focus on interesting angles and recent developments.

Create a detailed blog post outline for the topic '{{topic}}' based on these key points:

{{research}}

The outline should have:
- An engaging title
- Introduction hook
- 3-4 main sections with subsections
- Conclusion

Format the outline clearly with headings.

Write a complete, engaging blog post following this outline:

{{outline}}

Make it:
- Conversational and engaging
- Well-researched with examples
- Around 800-1200 words
- Include actionable takeaways

Format in Markdown with proper headings.

parameters.prompt: Create a professional, modern blog post cover image for an article about {{topic}}. Style: clean, minimalist, professional. High quality.

outputs.description: The complete blog post in Markdown format
